caption:
Dive into all-you-can-eat breakfast in these spots in Dubai:

💗 Love Vibe, DIFC
💵 AED 79: Unlimited savory breakfast, 1 dessert, 1 drink
🕗 Weekdays: 8 AM to 11 AM, Weekends: 8 AM to 3 PM

💚 Circle Cafe
💵 AED 69: Unlimited breakfast, 1 cup of coffee or tea
🕗 Weekends: 8 AM to 4 PM

🤎 LDC Kitchen
💵 AED: 69: Unlimited brunch, 1 drink
🕗 Weekends: until 4 PM

Who is your unli-breakfast date? Tag them in the comments! 💗
